[[File:Krystilia chathead.png|left]]
'''Krystilia''' is a [[Slayer master]] found in [[Edgeville]]'s jail north-east of the [[bank]]. When spoken to, she expresses her love for [[magic]] and the Wilderness, and claims the guards locked her in the cell for trouble-making.

Players can speak to her to change their [[respawn]] point to Edgeville for a one-time fee of 5,000,000 [[coins]].

Blocking a task with Krystilia costs 100 [[Slayer reward point|Slayer reward points]].

In the [[Demonic Pacts League]], she can be found in [[Ferox Enclave]], as [[Misthalin]] is inaccessible.

==Slayer==
Krystilia is a Slayer master who assigns the player [[monsters]] found within the [[Wilderness]]. '''Only''' kills within the Wilderness count towards her tasks. Before being assigned a Wilderness task, she will warn you that she will assign '''any''' monster regardless of your combat level.

She will refuse to assign tasks to players who are still Level 1 in Slayer, insisting that they first need to speak to the [[Burthorpe]] Slayer Master [[Turael]] so that he teaches the player about the how the skill works. One good way to get around this is by doing the [[Natural history quiz]] at the Varrock Museum, which will give 1,000 XP both in Slayer and in [[Hunter]], bringing both skills to Level 9, assuming both were at Level 1.

Unlike other slayer masters, Krystilia's tasks have a separate counter from the normal slayer masters, thus players must complete five tasks from her to begin their Wilderness point streak. Despite using two different counters, players '''cannot''' have both a normal and Wilderness slayer task at the same time. However, if the player is given a task they do not want and cannot skip it, they can go to [[Turael]] to remove it (provided that he cannot assign it), though this will remove the Wilderness task streak and require players to complete another five tasks from her to start gaining points again.

For a kill to count towards a Krystilia task, the player must be physically located inside the Wilderness when the monster's death occurs. A player who is using a [[dwarf multicannon]] will receive the standard "As your slayer task is from Krystilia, you can only perform it inside the Wilderness" message if they teleport out of the Wilderness to restock and remain outside of it when their cannon kills the monster. The safe zone buffer immediately outside the [[Ferox Enclave]] counts as the Wilderness for task purposes, but the Enclave itself does not. Thus a player using the [[pool of refreshment]] to resupply will not receive credit for the kill if they are inside the Enclave. 

In return for completing her tasks in the Wilderness, players will have a chance to roll for [[Larran's key]] and [[Slayer's enchantment]] drops. Due to the nature of the Wilderness and the varying location(s) of the assigned monster(s), it is recommended that players do not bring items they are not willing to lose, as it is possible to be killed at any time from other players. She also awards significantly more slayer points than any other master.

Completion of a task assigned by Krystilia '''from 5th task streak and beyond''' will grant:
{|class=wikitable style="text-align:center;"
!Task interval
!Points given
|-

Krystilia's blocks cost 100 Slayer points.

==Useful teleports==
[[File:Wilderness map.png|thumb|200px|link=Krystilia/Strategies#Map of the Wilderness|A detailed map of the [[Wilderness]].]]
*[[Edgeville]] - [[Fairy rings|Fairy ring]] (code {{Fairycode|dkr}}), [[Amulet of glory]], or [[Paddewwa Teleport]]
**[[Edgeville Monastery]] - [[Combat bracelet]]
**[[Lesser Fanatic]] - [[Achievement Diary Cape]] is the closest teleport to [[Krystilia]]
*[[Corporeal Beast]] lair - [[Games necklace]]
*[[The Forgotten Cemetery]] - [[Cemetery Teleport]] or [[Dareeyak Teleport]]
*[[Burning amulet]]
**[[Chaos Temple (Wilderness)|Chaos Temple]]
**[[Bandit Camp (Wilderness)|Bandit Camp]]
**[[Lava Maze]]
*[[Graveyard of Shadows]] - [[Carrallanger Teleport]]
*[[Demonic Ruins]] - [[Annakarl Teleport]]
*[[Frozen Waste Plateau]] - [[Ice Plateau Teleport]] or [[Ghorrock Teleport]]
*[[Fountain of Rune]] - [[Wilderness sword 4]]

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 23 July 2025
|update = Varlamore: The Final Dawn Out Now
|change = Krystilia's Slayer assignments now boost the [[mossy key]] drop rate only within the [[Wilderness]].
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 9 February 2022
|update = Land of the Goblins
|poll = 
|change = Increased the weighting of the new Wilderness Slayer tasks from 3 to 5.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 2 February 2022
|update = Revenant Maledictus & Wilderness Changes
|poll = 
|change = * Krystilia now assigns Abyssal Demons (75-125), Dust Devils (75-125), Jellies (100-150), and Nechryael (75-125)
* Fire Giant task reduced from 100-150 to 75-125.
* Hill Giant task reduced from 100-150 to 75-125.
* Bloodveld task reduced from 90-140 to 70-110.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 18 June 2020
|update = Poll 71 and Darkmeyer Updates
|change = The number of black knights north of Venenatis were increased from 2 to 7 and the number of bloodveld spawns in the Wilderness Dungeon were increased from 2 to 5.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 30 April 2020
|update = Poll 70 and Bounty Hunter Changes
|change = Bloodvelds, hill giants, moss giants, black knights, pirates and zombies were added to her list of tasks.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 25 January 2018
|update = Barbarian Assault Ranged Rework
|change = [[Lesser demon]]s were added to her list of tasks, as was previously stated in the newspost where she became a Slayer master.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 23 November 2017
|update = Mage Arena II, Revenant Caves & Deadman Beta
|change = [[Chaos druid]]s were added to her list of tasks, as was previously stated in the newspost where she became a Slayer master.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 13 April 2017
|update = Wilderness Slayer
|change = Krystilia was made into a [[Slayer master]] and she was given a name. Previously, she was simply known as "Witch".
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 11 July 2013
|poll = Old School feature poll 6 - Castle Wars, etc.
|update = Patch Notes (11 July 2013)
|change = A witch has been added in Edgeville's guardhouse. She can set your default respawn point to Edgeville, for a large fee.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
*According to Mod Ash in a Q&A stream, Krystilia was initially going to be named Kystrilia, but due to "[[wiktionary:KYS|Kys]]" being the first three letters, they decided to relocate the R.{{CiteVideo|author=Old School RuneScape|title=New Justiciar Armour from Theatre of Blood - Design Stream with Mod West|url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o3jG9hbZDv4&t=9721s|timestamp=2h42m|date=11 April 2018|site=Youtube}}
* Krystilia had a festive override wearing a santa-witch hat during the [[2023 Christmas event/Gallery|2023]], [[2024 Christmas event/Gallery|2024]], and [[2025 Christmas event/Gallery|2025]] Christmas events.
* Krystilia is the witch who killed the merchant Larran, later sending adventurers into the Wilderness to obtain the keys to his chests rather than looting them herself.
